params.bulkApplySnapshot: {{(function() { const fields = _local.bulkApplyFields ?? []; const applyAll = _local.bulkApplyAll !== false; const boardIds = _local._bulkApplyBoardIds ?? []; const tab = _global.activeBoardSettingsTab || 'basic_defaults'; const form = _local.form || {}; return { fields: fields, applyAll: applyAll, boardIds: boardIds, tab: tab, form: form }; })()}}
